children.text: Chart a system. Build a faction. Risk the stars.
A framed command deck for multiplayer campaigns, fast single-player setup, and in-game ship-console tooling.
Multiplayer lobbies with a shared command shell.
Single-player lineup builder with AI command slots.
Dockable in-game windows styled as one console family.
